items.title: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth
items.description: Shares of Indian software firms tumbled on Friday, joining a global selloff in tech stocks after Accenture Plc forecast slower revenue growth, deepening concerns over a sector that has shed nearly 30%
items.title_original: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth
items.title_en: Indian Software Stocks Tumble After Accenture Warns on Growth

items.summary: 埃森哲预测收入增长放缓后，印度软件公司股价周五大幅下跌，加入全球科技股抛售潮，引发对该行业已近30%市值损失的担忧。这反映了全球IT服务市场的潜在风险，对元宝产品经理评估企业服务AI工具的市场环境有参考价值。
